intentSynonyms: look up a feed in bsky
fetch a single feed in bsky
view one specific feed in bsky
get posts from a custom feed in bsky
description: Get posts from a custom feed generator (e.g., Discover, What's Hot). Requires the feed AT URI.

feed.description: AT URI of the feed generator (e.g., at://did/app.bsky.feed.generator/rkey)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response

limit.description: Maximum number of posts to return (default 50, max 100)
